subcodes.first_line: In this day it is incumbent upon all the beloved of God to observe, with penetrating vision, the matters that arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم لازم است که جمیع احبای الهی بابصار حدیده در امورات وارده ملاحظه نمایند
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
